---
author: "Sophia Choudhri"
title: "report"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-24"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(gtsummary)
library(config)
```


# Load Data

```{r}
here::i_am("subproject_sophia/report.Rmd")

data <- read.csv(
  file = here::here("subproject_sophia/output/clean_data.rds")
)
```


# Regression Testing 

```{r}
regression <- readRDS(regression, 
        file = here::here("subproject_sophia/output/fit_model.rds"))
```


# Table

```{r}
table <- readRDS(table, 
        file = here::here ("subproject_sophia/output/table.rds" ))

table
```
